title: Targets Locked: The Minds Behind Arrow and David’s Sling Are Revealed ransomware incident

victim.name: Targets Locked: The Minds Behind Arrow and David’s Sling Are Revealed

extortion.description: Once again, Handala RedWanted has shattered the illusion of security within the Zionist regime. This week, we have unveiled the names of 13 principal architects behind the ‘Arrow’ and ‘David’s Sling’ defense systems, individuals once believed to be shadows, now fully exposed to the world. A reward of $30,000 awaits anyone who provides valuable information…
